_comment: Phase-0 frontier-model curation: high-value APAC (ex-Singapore) sovereign-AI / government / NVIDIA-partner conferences in-window (mid-2026 → end-2027), verified against official sources 2026-06-25; re-verified 2026-07-05. NOT in Victor's existing SG-only Notion. Seeded into '📅 AI Events — Singapore' as Status='Proposed' (NOT confirmed) so they surface in the weekly digest for Victor to approve + tier. finn re-verifies dates on first radar check (several APAC dates are estimated/churn — see verify notes per row). 2026-07-05 status: ASOCIO now officially confirmed; AAIMS + FPT Techday still UNVERIFIABLE (official sites down/stale) — do NOT treat their dates as fact; added ASEAN AI Summit for MSMEs (PH ASEAN-chair 2026 deliverable). Tier uses the existing ⭐ vocabulary; Themes use the allowed Themes list.

conferences.name: ASEAN AI Malaysia Summit 2026 (AAIMS)
conferences.nvidia_angle: Malaysia's govt flagship AI summit (ASEAN ministers; PM Anwar keynoted 2025); the room where sovereign-AI policy + the RM2B sovereign AI cloud are shaped. ⚠️ UNVERIFIABLE as of 2026-07-05: official site aimalaysiasummit.gov.my is DOWN/parked (TLS mismatch, cPanel landing); 2025 edition was 12–13 Aug @ MITEC. The 'Aug 8–9 2026' figure is aggregator-extrapolated (webmobi) — DO NOT treat as confirmed. Distinct from AIMX / AI Malaysia Expo (~18–20 Aug, MITEC).

conferences.name: Manila Tech Summit 2026
conferences.organiser: FinTech Alliance.PH (Office of the President / BSP / DICT)
conferences.nvidia_angle: ASEAN flagship with President Marcos opening keynote; agenda centers on agentic AI, data governance, digital infrastructure — top-tier government/GLC engagement venue. CONFIRMED 2026-07-05: venue = Manila Marriott Grand Ballroom; President Marcos Jr. opening keynote confirmed; theme 'Building ASEAN's Digital Economy: Secure. Sustainable. Inclusive. Borderless.' (DEFA focus).

conferences.name: Techsauce Global Summit 2026
conferences.nvidia_angle: Thailand's flagship tech/startup summit (400+ speakers); best Bangkok developer-ecosystem stage and a channel to SIAM.AI's sovereign-AI cloud narrative (NVIDIA's Thai NCP).

conferences.name: FPT Techday 2026
conferences.venue: Hanoi or Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
conferences.nvidia_angle: Vietnam's largest tech forum, run by FPT — NVIDIA's flagship Vietnam partner (FPT AI Factory on NVIDIA GPUs). Best venue for the Vietnam sovereign-AI-cloud story. ⚠️ UNVERIFIABLE as of 2026-07-05: NO 2026 (or 2025) edition announced anywhere; official site still promotes Techday 2023; last confirmed edition was Nov 2024 (HCMC). May not occur — DO NOT treat 'Nov 12–13' as confirmed.

conferences.name: World AI Show Indonesia 2026
conferences.nvidia_angle: Framed 'Architecting Indonesia's Sovereign & Scalable AI Future' — sovereign cloud, home-grown LLMs, national data centres, edge inference. Telco-led sovereign-AI buyers (Indosat/Telkom). CONFIRMED 2026-07-05 (imminent): venue = Sheraton Grand Jakarta; co-located with 'Finance 2045'; 47th global edition.

conferences.name: Asia AI Infrastructure Indonesia Summit 2026
conferences.nvidia_angle: Theme is verbatim NVIDIA territory: 'Adaptive and Trusted Sovereign AI Infrastructure'; the AI-factory / data-center / GPU-cluster buyer audience (Telkomsigma etc.).

conferences.name: ASOCIO Digital & AI Summit 2026
conferences.nvidia_angle: Govt-backed Asia-Oceania flagship; inaugural AI Summit on 'Infrastructure and Regional Sovereignty' + 'AI for Governments and Society'. CONFIRMED 2026-07-05 via official site: 5–7 Oct at Swissôtel Jakarta PIK Avenue; co-located ASOCIO Digital Summit + inaugural ASOCIO AI Summit ('AI Beyond Hype'), ~800 delegates / 24 economies. (A 'July 29–31' snippet was wrong — conflated the soft-launch.)

conferences.name: Gen AI Summit Indonesia 2026
conferences.nvidia_angle: Dedicated GenAI summit for Indonesian enterprise adopters; maps to NeMo/NIM + the agentic-AI story. Chaired by the Indonesian AI Association.

conferences.name: DCCI Expo Malaysia 2027
conferences.nvidia_angle: Malaysia's flagship data-center/cloud expo around the Johor + Klang Valley + Cyberjaya buildout ('AI Nation 2030') — the GB200/sovereign-cloud infra layer; MITI/MDEC anchoring.

conferences.name: Data Center Asia Malaysia 2026
conferences.organiser: Informa Markets (co-located w/ Smart Nation Expo)
conferences.nvidia_angle: Large data-center / smart-city expo (21,000+); the physical infra (power/cooling/colocation) underpinning Johor's GPU deployments.

conferences.name: Global DPI Summit 2027
conferences.organiser: Co-Develop / ITU / UNDP / World Bank / Govt of Indonesia
conferences.nvidia_angle: First Asia edition of the UN-backed Digital Public Infrastructure summit; top-tier policy-maker access — the government/citizen-workflow + sovereign-compute angle in the JD.

conferences.name: Money20/20 Asia 2027
conferences.nvidia_angle: Asia's #1 fintech show; regional banks + regulators (Bank of Thailand keynoted 2026). AI-in-finance / agentic-AI + accelerated-compute story alongside SIAM.AI.

conferences.name: ASEAN AI Summit for MSMEs 2026
conferences.nvidia_angle: NEW 2026-07-05: the Philippines' ASEAN Chairship 2026 priority AI deliverable — the 'ASEAN Leaders' Declaration on AI-Powered MSME Growth', aligned to the ASEAN Guide on AI Governance & Ethics + Responsible AI Roadmap 2025–2030. Govt/sovereign-AI cooperation flagship; replaces the (now-past) ADGMIN 2026 watch. ⚠️ month = confirmed (Sept 2026, DICT); EXACT dates/venue NOT yet published (event_start is a month placeholder). No NVIDIA angle stated yet but a natural ecosystem target.
